title: MODIFICATIONS

content_blocks.text:
SJN *** K11 U4 000000
*: Any of the possibilities. See Vehicle Identification Number arrangement.
All models comply with CEDIII regulation (E-OBD for petrol engine models).
The CG13 DE has been replaced by the CGA3DE (increased engine displacement).

Double cone synchro on 1st and 2nd gear for petrol engine models.
Introduction of RE0F21A (replaces RE0F05A)

Exterior changes (head lamps, rear combination lamps, etc.)
Interior changes (trim, instrument panel, etc.)

model_notes: Petrol engine models noted specifically for CEDIII/E-OBD compliance, double cone synchro on 1st and 2nd gear, and RE0F21A transmission introduction.
